# Offset-carrier path against a boundary with a curved edge. Mirrors
# curved-boundary.txt but with offset_carriers on. Phase-1 expectation:
# the curved side's discretized chord-spines produce many short per-edge
# spines; most fail `MIN_STALLS_PER_SPINE`. Path grouping in a follow-up
# task will merge them into a single placement path.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(200,0) arc=-0.375
(200,160)
(0,160)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(200,160), area 32000

set stall-angle=90
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 61
faces: 4 (boundary: 1, interior: 3)
graph: 12 vertices, 15 edges (perimeter: 12, interior: 3)
regions: 1
